TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Taukak ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Shoufeng, kwara sali buwan nya ga 157 buwan, 394 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 54 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 340 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 9%, Truku 2%, Tayan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Taukak hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Taukak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Taukak hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taukak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Taukak hya' ga Cealalupalantdlu. tay mkyahu' na Taukak hya' ga Kiku. tay 'llaw na Taukak hya' ga Tdlu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ taukak ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕħou*eŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨealalupalant*lu. taj mkjaħuʔ na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa kiku. taj ʔllaw na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa t*lu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Taukak ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Shoufeng, kwara sali buwan nya ga 157 buwan, 394 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 54 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 340 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 9%, Truku 2%, Tayan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Taukak hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Taukak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Taukak hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taukak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Taukak hya' ga Cealalupalantdlu. tay mkyahu' na Taukak hya' ga Kiku. tay 'llaw na Taukak hya' ga Tdlu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ taukak ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕħou*eŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨealalupalant*lu. taj mkjaħuʔ na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa kiku. taj ʔllaw na taukak ħjaʔ ɣa t*lu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
